fact: Every great journey starts with a single pedal stroke. We've officially begun the challenge!
We've ridden the equivalent of crossing the English Channel and back!
We've completed a 'Century'. That's the width of Rhode Island three times over!
We've traveled the entire length of the Suez Canal in Egypt.
We've covered the distance of the famous Seattle to Portland classic bike ride.
We've traveled the distance from Earth up to the International Space Station!
We've traveled the equivalent distance between London and Paris.
We've ridden the distance from San Francisco to Los Angeles.
We've ridden far enough to cross the entire state of Iowa from East to West.
We've traveled the full length of the Grand Canyon and then some!
We've officially ridden 500 miles! According to the song, we have 500 more to go.
We've traveled from the Georgia border to the very tip of the Florida Keys.
We've covered the distance from the Italian Alps to the 'toe' of the boot.
We've covered the distance between the capitals of South Korea and Japan.
We've traveled the width of the Red Sea at its widest point.
We've officially made it across the widest part of Texas!
We've traveled the entire vertical length of the state of California.
We've completed the legendary 'Land's End to John o' Groats' route across Britain.
We've traveled the distance from the UK to the heart of the Roman Empire.
We've covered the distance a Blue Whale migrates in a single week!
We've walked (or ridden) 500 miles, and then we rode 500 more!
We've traveled nearly half the length of the world's largest coral reef.
We've crossed the width of the Sahara Desert.
We've traveled from the Big Apple down to the beaches of Miami.
We've traveled the entire length of Norway from south to north.
We've traveled the distance across the Mediterranean Sea.
We've traveled the entire length of the Himalayan mountain range.
We've traveled the distance across the Gulf of Mexico.
We've covered a massive portion of the Rocky Mountain range.
We've completed the equivalent of half the Appalachian Trail!
We've traveled from the Atlantic coast all the way to the Mile High City.
We've followed the path of the Danube, Europe's second-longest river.
We've covered the distance from the bottom of Denmark to the top of Sweden.
We've traveled the entire length of the Baja California Peninsula.
We've traveled the distance from the north to the south of Australia.
We've traveled the distance of nearly the entire coastline of Madagascar.
We've covered a significant portion of the Great Wall of China's total length.
We've traveled the distance from Western Europe deep into Russia.
We've traveled the distance from London all the way to Istanbul.
We've traveled the equivalent length of the mighty Yukon River.
We've traveled nearly halfway across the Atlantic Ocean! Next stop: Europe?
We have collectively rode the entire length of the Tour de France! Excellent work, everyone!
